name: 86 Chaos 15.0.99 Native App Shell Polish
label: 15.0.99 Native App Shell Polish
notes: Adds a native-feeling PWA app shell with persistent mobile bottom navigation and desktop shortcut rail.
Tightens the header/footer chrome so the app feels less like stacked webpages while keeping desktop browser usability.
Improves route loading with app-style skeleton feedback while preserving existing pages, routes, permissions, and push duplicate fixes.
